acceptance_statement: ZPE-Robotics is ratified for a bounded-lossy robot motion telemetry archive/search surface only. The active claim is archive/replay infrastructure with decoded PrimitiveIndex search, packet integrity, VLA token export, Phase 10 LeRobot benchmark breadth, and threshold-selected attack-5 anomaly evidence.

unresolved_blockers.reason: strict bit-exact replay and search-without-decode are not both proven
real corpus has 136 episodes at 10 Hz, below the 200 episode / 50 Hz target
external third-party reproduction has not been produced
ZPE-IMC does not expose and this package does not route through a robotics .zpbot encode/decode ABI

verification_gates.evidence: active README, blocker, FAQ, audit, legal, release-candidate, and GPD surfaces agree on attack 5 and unresolved blockers
3 qualified LeRobot datasets across 3 families, compression spread 58.70x to 186.05x
lossless, bit-exact, search-without-decode, live-control, and IMC-integrated claims are explicit non-claims
B3, attack 3, attack 7, and Robotics Rust ABI remain unresolved in active authority files
